tests_added: tests/unit/ruinModifiers.test.ts: no-op when fracture=0 and ruinLevel=0
tests/unit/ruinModifiers.test.ts: no-op when fracture=0.1 and ruinLevel=0.1 (makeParams defaults) — below RUIN_THRESHOLD
tests/unit/ruinModifiers.test.ts: no-op for fast preset values (fracture≈0.007, ruinLevel≈0.009)
tests/unit/ruinModifiers.test.ts: fracture=0.8 distorts mesh positions/rotations from original values
tests/unit/ruinModifiers.test.ts: collapse: ruinLevel=0.6 reduces Y-scale on at least one non-base mesh
tests/unit/ruinModifiers.test.ts: ruinLevel=0.8 adds debris children to the group
tests/unit/ruinModifiers.test.ts: ruinLevel=1.0 produces exactly MAX_DEBRIS (12) additional children
tests/unit/ruinModifiers.test.ts: all transforms produce finite numbers at fracture=1, ruinLevel=1
tests/unit/ruinModifiers.test.ts: all transforms produce finite numbers at boundary fracture=0.15, ruinLevel=0.15
tests/unit/ruinModifiers.test.ts: identical params produce identical transforms (deterministic)
tests/unit/ruinModifiers.test.ts: higher fracture produces larger distortion offsets
tests/unit/ruinModifiers.test.ts: higher ruinLevel produces more debris
tests/unit/geometryBuilder.test.ts: US-012 default makeParams still produces exactly 4 children — no US-011 regression
tests/unit/geometryBuilder.test.ts: US-012 fast preset values produce exactly 4 children — fast state clean
tests/unit/geometryBuilder.test.ts: US-012 poor-like values produce more than 4 children (debris added)
tests/unit/geometryBuilder.test.ts: US-012 poor-like values produce group with distorted positions
tests_modified: tests/unit/geometryBuilder.test.ts: updated three.js Mesh mock to include scale property and position tracking via set()
